title: Identification of malignant cells in single-cell transcriptomics data.
author: Andreatta M Garnica J Carmona SJ
content: S-EPMC12373766 PMC12373766 Identification of malignant cells in single-cell transcriptomics data. Single-cell transcriptomics has significantly advanced our ability to uncover the cellular heterogeneity of tumors. A key challenge in single-cell transcriptomics is identifying cancer cells
